name: Sarah Jenkins
title: Broker / Owner
bio: Sarah founded Knot Shore Realty after fifteen years working in residential sales across the city and inner suburbs. She specializes in historic neighborhoods and has guided hundreds of buyers through the complexities of purchasing pre-war homes.

name: Michael Chen
title: Associate Broker
bio: Michael brings a background in architecture to his real estate practice, giving buyers and sellers a sharper eye for structural value and renovation potential. He focuses on mid-century properties in St. Louis County's established suburbs.

name: Jennifer Williams
title: Realtor
bio: Jennifer grew up in St. Charles County and knows its communities inside and out. She works primarily with first-time buyers and growing families looking for new construction and established subdivisions west of the Missouri River.

name: Robert Davis
title: Senior Agent
bio: Robert has spent twenty years in St. Louis real estate with a focus on investment properties and multi-family assets. His background in commercial lending gives clients a practical lens on financing and return potential.

name: Amanda Taylor
title: Residential Specialist
bio: Amanda specializes in the Central West End, Clayton, and the Tower Grove neighborhoods. She is known for patient, detail-oriented service and a deep familiarity with the condo and townhouse market in urban St. Louis.
